hooks.command: node -e "const c=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8')).tool_input?.command||''; const blocked=[/git\s+reset\s+--hard/,/git\s+push\s+.*--force(?!-with-lease)/,/git\s+clean\s+-[a-zA-Z]*f/,/git\s+checkout\s+--\s+\./]; const hit=blocked.find(r=>r.test(c)); if(hit){console.error('BLOCKED by Our AI Charter safety hook: refusing destructive git -- '+c.slice(0,120));process.exit(2)}"
